feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: We need to read purchase requisition header text in email notification in PR flexible workflow
entry.content:
For workflow scenario WS02000458, we need to read purchase requisition header text (Text Object : EBANH, Text ID : B01) and send that in email notification in PR flexible workflow. Is there any standard CDS view available which can be used to read the purchase requisition header text. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to extend Display Purchase Order - F7117
entry.content:
Hi Team

We have a requirement to extend Object page of the Fiori app – Display Purchase Order (F7117) by adding a new Facet to display the list of Freight Vendor for a Purchase Order. But we are facing challenge while extending. Details are provided below.

 

 

Requirement – Extend Object page of the Fiori app – Display Purchase Order (F7117) by adding a new Facet to display the list of Freight Vendor for a Purchase Order.

 

 

 

Approach – Since this application is built using CDS and UI annotations, we have tried to extend the standard CDS view ‘C_PurchaseOrderFs’ which is used in this ODATA service – ‘C_PURCHASEORDER_FS_SRV’.

 

Issue – After extending the CDS view, association is not showing up in the $metadata and new Facet is not coming up in the Fiori app

 

Below is the code snippet.

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZEXT1'

@EndUserText.label: 'Extend C_PurchaseOrderFs'

extend view C_PurchaseOrderFs with ZEXT_C_PurchaseOrderFs

association [0..*] to ZC_FREIGHT as _Supplier6 on _Supplier6.PurchaseOrder = $projection.purchaseorder

{

      @ui.facet: [

      {

        id: 'FreightVendorFacet',

        type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,

        label: 'Freight Vendors',

        position: 100,

        targetElement: '_Supplier6'

      }

    ]

   

//    _HeaderExtension.knumv,

//    _HeaderExtension._Supplier2,

//    I_PurchaseOrderEnhanced.PD5,

//    _Supplier5,

cast('1234' as abap.char( 4 )) as test,  //Ignore this line of code

 

 

    _Supplier6

}

 

 

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCFREIGHT'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'ZC Freight'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define view ZC_FREIGHT as select from ZEXT_FREIGHT

{

    key PurchaseOrder,

    key DocumentCondition,

    @ui.lineItem: [{

           label: 'Vendor',

           position: 10,

           importance: #HIGH }]   

    key FreightVendor,

    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'

    @ui.lineItem: [{

           label: 'Amount',

           position: 20,

           importance: #HIGH }]   

    FreightAmount,

    @Semantics.currencyCode: true   

    Currency

   

}

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRFREIGHT'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Freight'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define view ZEXT_FREIGHT as select from ekko a

inner join prcd_elements as b on a.knumv = b.knumv

//association [0..*] to prcd_elements as prcd on po.knumv = prcd.knumv

{

//    @ui.facet: [

//                {

//                    label: 'Frieght Charges',

//                    id: 'Frieght Charges',

//                    parentId: 'GeneralInformation',

//                    type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,

//                    position: 10

//                  }

//                  ]

//   @Consumption.filter.hidden: true

 

 

    key a. ebeln as PurchaseOrder,

    key b. knumv as DocumentCondition,

//    @ui.lineItem: [{

//           label: 'Vendor',

//           position: 10,

//           importance: #HIGH }]

    key b.lifnr as FreightVendor,

    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'

//    @ui.lineItem: [{

//           label: 'Amount',

//           position: 20,

//           importance: #HIGH }]

    sum(b.kwert) as FreightAmount,

//    @Semantics.currencyCode: true

    b.waerk as Currency

}

where b.kntyp = 'B'

group by a.ebeln, b.knumv, b.lifnr, b.waerk

 

 

Regards

Pranam

entry.title: Do you think your current ERP setup supports or limits your AI initiatives?
entry.content: I feel like ERP can either really help or quietly get in the way of AI. Curious how it’s working for you.

entry.title: At what point does ERP complexity start affecting business performance?
entry.content: At some point ERP complexity just starts slowing everything down… wondering when that usually hits for others.

entry.title: What’s actually working when communicating SAP Business AI value to clients?
entry.content: I feel like a lot of the AI talk sounds good in theory, but in real conversations it doesn’t always land the same way. In your experience, what parts of SAP Business AI do clients actually understand or get interested in right away? And what usually needs more explaining or just doesn’t click at all?

entry.title: Do you think your current ERP setup supports or limits your AI initiatives?
entry.content: Does your ERP actually help when you try to do something with AI, or does it end up getting in the way?

entry.title: At what point does ERP complexity start affecting business performance?
entry.content: When does ERP complexity stop being manageable and start becoming a real problem for the business? When do you actually start feeling it in daily operations, like things getting slower or more annoying than they should be?

entry.title: Lessons Learned from Hypercare to AMS Transition in S/4HANA Projects
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In several SAP S/4HANA projects, I have observed that the transition from hypercare to AMS support is often more challenging than anticipated, even when KT activities, documentation, and sign-offs are completed successfully.

Systems may appear stable during the early go-live period, but operational issues can surface later during peak business cycles such as month-end processing, interface spikes, or batch job overlaps.

Some areas that I personally found important during AMS transition include:

  • Understanding real production behaviour during peak load
  • Identifying critical monitoring periods
  • Capturing lessons learned from hypercare
  • Enhancing coordination between project and AMS teams
  • Building AMS team troubleshooting confidence before full takeover

In certain situations, temporary workarounds or manual monitoring activities performed during hypercare were not fully documented during KT, which later created operational ambiguity for support teams.

I would like to hear from the community:

  • What are the key challenges you have seen during Hypercare to AMS transition in S/4HANA projects?
  • Are there any best practices your teams follow to improve operational readiness and long-term support stability?

I look forward to hearing different experiences and approaches from the community.

Best regards,
Raghu Garapati

entry.title: SAPConnect_SCOT Configuration Note_S/4HANA 2022(v)
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We would require a note on 

SAP standard document for Inbound Email configuration in SAP S/4 HANA 2022, SAP_BASIS 757.

Could you please help with a SAP Note at earliest as we are running out of time.

Regards, Usha

entry.title: S/4HANA AIF enhancement for Order to Cash
entry.content: In the Exisiting S4HANA system we have custom order type flow happen for Order type ZXX but for one region the existing SAP API does not support the required order type ZXXX. This limitation blocks order creation and directly impacts touchless ordering adoption in the affected sales areas. how do we enable the use of the by allowing the order type to be converted to ZXXX via AIF during order creation. from web order flow and SAP boundary (AIF) --> Intercept CREATE only? Please throw some details to implement the same.

entry.title: SAP standard function modules which are in not released status
entry.content:
Hello,

Following our recent upgrade from ECC to S/4HANA, we’ve identified instances where our custom code calls SAP function module VKK_FICA_DI that are not released for customer use. We would appreciate SAP’s guidance on suitable, released alternatives that we can adopt in our custom developments.

Could you please advise on:

  • Recommended released APIs (e.g., BAPIs, fubctions, released classes/methods, or other whitelisted interfaces) that can replace the unreleased function modules
  • Any standard tools or documentation to help map unreleased function modules to released equivalents

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transaction MEMASSIN (MassMaintenance of Purchasing Info Rec) is not updating field EINA‑meins
entry.content:
Transaction MEMASSIN (Mass Maintenance of Purchasing Info Records – Purchasing Org Data) is not updating the field EINA‑MEINS (Order Unit). Please confirm whether EINA‑MEINS is supported for mass update in MEMASSIN, and if not, provide the SAP standard restriction and the correct method or API recommended by SAP to update EINA general data fields such as MEINS. I need clarification on which data segments (EINA vs EINE) MEMASSIN is designed to update, and the official reason why MEINS is excluded.

Field EINA-MEINS EXIST in massfldlst table NOT REFLECTING IN BUS3003 IN TRANSACTION MEMASSIN

entry.title: Delta enabled replication Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors 2LIS
entry.content:
Hi,

Could someone please help me with an issue? I am extracting data from an S/4 system using 2LIS extractors. I have completed all prerequisites, including enabling the primary keys. However, when I try to run the delta-enabled replication, I am getting an error.

Could anyone please guide me on how to resolve this and successfully achieve the required data load?

please find the error attached

entry.title: SO10 text format - in continuation of case - 390687/2026
entry.content:
This is in continuation of case - 390687/2026 .

We checked the NOTE which was mentioned in previous case and following is our observation.

We have reviewed the email generation logic in detail and confirmed that this behavior is standard SAP logic. The email body is created using CL_DOCUMENT_BCS=>CREATE_DOCUMENT with content type TXT, which inherently does not support formatted text such as bold or underline. This is standard SAP design and aligns with SAPconnect behavior as described in SAP Note 171698.

entry.title: How to Disable payment medium workbench check box with company code and payment method wise
entry.content:
Hi Team

How to Disable payment medium workbench check box with company code and payment method wise

Charan

entry.title: Customer Vendor Integration Analysis out of sync in Readiness check report
entry.content:
Customer Vendor Integration Analysis out of sync in Readiness check report

I run the SAP Readiness Report, i made sure I used the tools to ensure we have all the latest notes implemented, but i still get this out of sync  with the uploaded report to SAP

The first run I got this issue; I followed the instructions of SAP 3688821 and executed a second run; again message is Out of sync

Question: if I run within the instance transaction CVI-PRECHK and fix all isssues from the Customer and Vendors report here; and I do another run with CGVI-PRECHK and it comes clean, can I ignore the info in the Readiness Report tile "Customer and Vendor" even if it isay Out of Sync?

entry.title: Error to change BA in asset master data
entry.content: Please be advised that the Business Area within the Asset Master Data will be updated using transaction AS02. This change will be implemented by creating a new time-dependent interval to preserve the historical audit trail for the existing asset.

entry.title: Assigning fixed assets to functional location
entry.content: How do I assign a fixed asset to a functional location?  Am I able to assign more than one asset to the same functional location?

entry.title: PSMASSCREATE_PROJ text-105 nur in Englisch vorhanden
entry.content: Der Text-105 im Standardprogramm PSMASSCREATE_PROJ ist nur auf Englisch verfügbar nicht auf Deutsch. System QS/4 100

entry.title: pedido permanece en estado bloqueado (indicador “B”) a pesar de que el workflow
entry.content: In SAP MM (Materials Management), the standard purchase order release process prevents final release (transition from “Blocked” (B) to “Released” (G)) if there are inconsistencies in price determination that prevent the correct calculation of the net value of the purchase order. This behavior is not an error or an arbitrary restriction, but rather a standard SAP control mechanism designed to ensure the financial integrity of the document. As a result, SAP automatically recalculates the release status (field EKKO-FRGKE) each time a purchase order is saved, and if it detects that the net value is inconsistent or cannot be properly determined, it forces the release indicator to remain in “B” (blocked). This dynamic re‑evaluation occurs through internal routines (such as the standard functions ME_PRICING and ME_REL_STRATEGIE_EKKO during the save process), and prevents the release status from being manually manipulated (even via debugging), since any manual change will not persist: the system will overwrite the indicator according to the actual document conditions at the time of saving.
